summary:
While FNAC can accurately diagnose most thyroid malignancies like papillary and follicular carcinoma, it may fall short in conclusively identifying certain types of pulmonary adenocarcinomas without further testing. \boxed{D}

The summary captures that while FNAC works well for some diagnoses, its effectiveness diminishes when differentiating specific non-thyroid conditions requiring more definitive confirmation. The boxed answer reflects this conclusion based on the given context.
